howItWorksSteps.title: Register Agent
howItWorksSteps.description: Mint ERC-721 via AgentRegistry to receive a persistent agentId as on-chain identity.

howItWorksSteps.title: Strategy Runs
howItWorksSteps.description: Rule-based engine reads live market data, computes EMA and Fisher Transform to detect trend-following and trend-reversal opportunities depending on the current market regime, and emits a TradeDecision.

howItWorksSteps.title: Sign Intent
howItWorksSteps.description: TradeIntent structured and signed by agentWallet using EIP-712 before any action.

howItWorksSteps.title: On-Chain Validation
howItWorksSteps.description: RiskRouter smart contract verifies position size, drawdown limits, and frequency constraints.

howItWorksSteps.title: Execute & Record
howItWorksSteps.description: Kraken CLI executes only on APPROVED. Checkpoint written on-chain with full audit trail.

whyQuasarReasons.title: Verifiable Identity
whyQuasarReasons.description: Agent registered via ERC-8004. Persistent agentId as NFT. Every action is attributable — no anonymous bots.

whyQuasarReasons.title: Enforced Risk
whyQuasarReasons.description: RiskRouter smart contract is the final gate. Position size, drawdown, and frequency validated on-chain before execution.

whyQuasarReasons.title: Full Explainability
whyQuasarReasons.description: Every decision includes regime state, EMA and Fisher Transform signals, confidence score, and reasoning. Nothing is hidden.
